tests.name: skill-metadata-is-valid
tests.when: An agent checks the skill's structure

agent_behavior: Skill has valid YAML frontmatter with name: skills-engineering
Skill has a non-empty description field

tests.name: all-nine-phases-accessible
tests.given: generate.sh is called with each of the 9 phases

agent_behavior: spec phase exits 0 and references spec.md
behavioral phase exits 0 and references BDD contract format
script-test phase exits 0 and includes test template
script phase exits 0 and enforces AC-by-AC discipline
skill phase exits 0 and prohibits eval references
adversary phase exits 0 and instructs studying the target
eval phase exits 0 and runs script tests first
refactor phase exits 0 and prohibits behavior changes
assert_sh: bash $SKILL_PATH/scripts/generate.sh --phase eval --skill-path /tmp/smk-test 2>&1 | grep -q 'Run script acceptance tests'

agent_behavior: Script lists all 9 valid phases in the error message

tests.name: script-acceptance-tests-pass
tests.given: The skills-engineering scripts are fully implemented
